## Outcome

## Affected roles and surfaces

<!-- Resident, hub navigator, provider, county user, internal operator, public site, mobile, web. -->

## Privacy and state-readiness review

- [ ] No unnecessary resident or provider data is collected or logged.
- [ ] CB-CAP data remains aggregate, de-identified, and disclosure-controlled.
- [ ] State-aware provider routing behavior is unchanged or explicitly tested.

## Accessibility and language access

- [ ] Keyboard, screen-reader, contrast, large-text, and mobile impacts were considered.
- [ ] Language and low-literacy implications were considered.

## AI and feature controls

- [ ] AI behavior remains non-clinical and has an operational control or documented exception.
- [ ] Relevant feature-control, usage, and incident behavior is documented.

<!-- List automated checks run, test coverage added, and how this change can be safely reversed. -->
